description: Render HTML/markdown to PDF, export rows to xlsx, and fill AcroForm PDFs.
name: io.github.cyanheads/docgen-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: How long a rendered document is retrievable before it expires, in seconds.
environmentVariables.name: DOCGEN_DOCUMENT_TTL_SECONDS

environmentVariables.description: Hard ceiling on a single rendered artifact in bytes; exceeding it aborts the render.
environmentVariables.name: DOCGEN_MAX_DOCUMENT_BYTES

environmentVariables.description: Per-render wall-clock budget in milliseconds; exceeding it aborts the render.
environmentVariables.name: DOCGEN_RENDER_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Artifacts at or under this byte size are returned inline as base64; larger ones omit it.
environmentVariables.name: DOCGEN_INLINE_MAX_BYTES

environmentVariables.description: PDF rendering engine. Only 'lightweight' is implemented; 'chromium' is reserved and rejected at startup.
environmentVariables.name: DOCGEN_PDF_ENGINE
